```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(lubridate)
library(haven)
library(socsci)
```

```{r}

exempt_orgs <- read_csv("data/eo_md.csv")

churches <- exempt_orgs |> 
  filter(FOUNDATION == "10") |> 
  mutate(zip5 = str_sub(ZIP, 1, 5))

write_csv(churches, "data/churches_md.csv")

gss <- read_sav("~/Downloads/GSS_spss/gss7224_r2.sav")

```

```{r}
life <- tribble(
  ~age, ~attend, ~group, 
  "Under 18", 7, "Option 1",
  "Young Adulthood", 3, "Option 1",
  "Married w/Children", 7, "Option 1",
  "Empty Nest", 4.5, "Option 1",
  "Retirement", 3.5, "Option 1",
  "Under 18", 7, "Option 2",
  "Young Adulthood", 3, "Option 2",
  "Married w/Children", 7, "Option 2",
  "Empty Nest", 8, "Option 2",
  "Retirement", 8.5, "Option 2",
  
)

life <- life %>% 
  mutate(age = as.factor(age))

life$age <- factor(life$age, levels = c("Under 18", "Young Adulthood", "Married w/Children", "Empty Nest", "Retirement"))

life %>% 
  ggplot(., aes(x = age, y = attend, group = group, color = group, linetype = group)) +
  geom_point(size=4, color="white") +
  geom_point(size=3, shape=1, alpha=.5) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19) +
  theme_rb() +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  scale_color_calc() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 10)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Attachment to Religion", title = "Conceptual Model: How Religious Attachment Changes Across the Life Course", 
       caption = "@ryanburge") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  add_text(x = 5.1, y = 4.1, word = "Drifting\nAway", sz = 4) +
  add_text(x = 5.1, y = 9.2, word = "Drawing\nCloser", sz = 4) +
  add_text(x = 1, y = 9.2, word = "Going because\nParents Make\nYou Go", sz = 4) +
  add_text(x = 2, y = 9.2, word = "Rebelling +\nFinding Your Way", sz = 4) +
  add_text(x = 3, y = 9.2, word = "Wanting Children\nto Have A\nMoral Foundation", sz = 4) +
  add_text(x = 4, y = 9.2, word = "Wondering If You\nReally Like Church?", sz = 4) 
save("life_example24.png", wd = 8)




gg1 <- gss %>% 
  mutate(
    lifestage = frcode(
      age >= 18 & age <= 29 ~ "18–29",
      age >= 30 & age <= 44 ~ "30–44",
      age >= 45 & age <= 59 ~ "45–59",
      age >= 60 & age <= 74 ~ "60–74",
      age >= 75 ~ "75+"
    )) %>% 
  filter(year == 1972) %>% 
  gss_attend(attend) %>% 
  group_by(lifestage) %>% 
  ct(att, wt = wtssall, show_na = FALSE) %>% 
  mutate(year = 1972)

gg2 <- gss %>% 
  mutate(
  lifestage = frcode(
    age >= 18 & age <= 29 ~ "18–29",
    age >= 30 & age <= 44 ~ "30–44",
    age >= 45 & age <= 59 ~ "45–59",
    age >= 60 & age <= 74 ~ "60–74",
    age >= 75 ~ "75+"
  )) %>% 
  filter(year == 2024) %>% 
  gss_attend(attend) %>% 
  group_by(lifestage) %>% 
  ct(att, wt = wtssnrps, show_na = FALSE) %>% 
  mutate(year = 2024)

both <- bind_rows(gg1, gg2) %>% filter(lifestage != "NA")


both  %>% 
  mutate(lab = round(pct, 2)) %>% 
  ggplot(., aes(x = fct_rev(lifestage), y = pct, fill = fct_rev(att))) +
  geom_col(color = "black") + 
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ year, ncol =1, strip.position = "top") +
  theme_rb() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(moma.colors("OKeeffe", 5))) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  theme(strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle=0)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse=T, nrow = 1)) +
  # theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(), axis.text.y=element_blank(), axis.ticks.y=element_blank()) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.y=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y=element_blank()) +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(pct >.05, paste0(lab*100, '%'), '')), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 8, family = "font", color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(pct >.05 & att == "Never", paste0(lab*100, '%'), '')), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 8, family = "font", color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(pct >.05 & att == "Seldom", paste0(lab*100, '%'), '')), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 8, family = "font", color = "white") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24)) +
  theme(strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1)) +
  theme(strip.text.x.top = element_text(size = 20)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", title = "Religious Attendance by Age, 1972 vs 2024", 
       caption = "@ryanburge | Data: General Social Survey, 1972-2024") 
save("gss_attend_age_compare.png", wd = 9, ht = 6)



library(tidyverse)
library(socsci)   # for mean_ci(), frcode(), etc.

gss_gen_lifestage <- gss %>%
  mutate(
    birthyr = year - age,
    
    # generation coding
    gen = frcode(
      birthyr <= 1927 ~ "Greatest",
      birthyr >= 1928 & birthyr <= 1945 ~ "Silent",
      birthyr >= 1946 & birthyr <= 1964 ~ "Boomer",
      birthyr >= 1965 & birthyr <= 1980 ~ "Gen X",
      birthyr >= 1981 & birthyr <= 1996 ~ "Millennial",
      birthyr >= 1997 ~ "Gen Z"
    ),
    
    # life stage
    lifestage = frcode(
      age >= 18 & age <= 29 ~ "18–29",
      age >= 30 & age <= 44 ~ "30–44",
      age >= 45 & age <= 59 ~ "45–59",
      age >= 60 & age <= 74 ~ "60–74",
      age >= 75 ~ "75+"
    ),
    
    # attendance: weekly+ or whatever you'd like
    weekly_plus = if_else(attend %in% c(6, 7, 8), 1, 0),
    
    # weight
    weight = case_when(
      year <= 2018 ~ wtssall,
      year >= 2021 ~ wtssnrps
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gen), !is.na(lifestage)) %>%
  group_by(gen, lifestage) %>%
  mean_ci(weekly_plus, wt = weight)  # gives mean, n, se, lower, upper


library(MetBrewer)

palette_gen <- c(
  "Greatest"   = "#1F77B4",  # Blue
  "Silent"     = "#D62728",  # Red
  "Boomer"     = "#2CA02C",  # Green
  "Gen X"      = "#9467BD",  # Purple
  "Millennial" = "#FF7F0E"   # Orange/Gold
)

gss_gen_lifestage %>%
  filter(gen != "Gen Z") %>% 
  mutate(
    lifestage = fct_relevel(lifestage, "18–29","30–44","45–59","60–74","75+"),
    gen = fct_relevel(gen, "Greatest","Silent","Boomer","Gen X","Millennial")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lifestage, y = mean, group = gen, color = gen)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(mean * 100, 0), "%")),
    vjust = -0.9, 
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold", color = "black",
    family = "bold", show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_gen) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(.1, .5)) +
  theme_rb(legend = TRUE) +
  labs(
    title = "Weekly Church Attendance by Life Stage and Generation",
    caption = "@ryanburge | Data: General Social Survey, 1972-2024",
    x = "Life Stage (Age)",
    y = "Weekly Attendance",
    color = "Generation"
  )

save("gss_by_life_stage_attend_lines.png")



gss <- gss %>%
  mutate(
    birthyr = year - age
  )


gss <- gss %>%
  mutate(
    # -----------------------
    # Cohort groups (birth year)
    # -----------------------
    cohorts = frcode(
      birthyr >= 1883 & birthyr <= 1899 ~ "1883-1899",
      birthyr >= 1900 & birthyr <= 1904 ~ "1900-1904",
      birthyr >= 1905 & birthyr <= 1909 ~ "1905-1909",
      birthyr >= 1910 & birthyr <= 1914 ~ "1910-1914",
      birthyr >= 1915 & birthyr <= 1919 ~ "1915-1919",
      birthyr >= 1920 & birthyr <= 1924 ~ "1920-1924",
      birthyr >= 1925 & birthyr <= 1929 ~ "1925-1929",
      birthyr >= 1930 & birthyr <= 1934 ~ "1930-1934",
      birthyr >= 1935 & birthyr <= 1939 ~ "1935-1939",
      birthyr >= 1940 & birthyr <= 1944 ~ "1940-1944",
      birthyr >= 1945 & birthyr <= 1949 ~ "1945-1949",
      birthyr >= 1950 & birthyr <= 1954 ~ "1950-1954",
      birthyr >= 1955 & birthyr <= 1959 ~ "1955-1959",
      birthyr >= 1960 & birthyr <= 1964 ~ "1960-1964",
      birthyr >= 1965 & birthyr <= 1969 ~ "1965-1969",
      birthyr >= 1970 & birthyr <= 1974 ~ "1970-1974",
      birthyr >= 1975 & birthyr <= 1979 ~ "1975-1979",
      birthyr >= 1980 & birthyr <= 1984 ~ "1980-1984",
      birthyr >= 1985 & birthyr <= 1989 ~ "1985-1989",
      birthyr >= 1990 & birthyr <= 1994 ~ "1990-1994",
      birthyr >= 1995 & birthyr <= 2000 ~ "1995-2000"
    ),
    
    # -----------------------
    # Life-stage bins (age)
    # -----------------------
    decades = frcode(
      age >= 18 & age <= 25 ~ "18\nto\n25",
      age >= 26 & age <= 35 ~ "26\nto\n35",
      age >= 36 & age <= 45 ~ "36\nto\n45",
      age >= 46 & age <= 55 ~ "46\nto\n55",
      age >= 56 & age <= 65 ~ "56\nto\n65",
      age >= 66             ~ "66\nand\nOlder"
    ),
    
    # -----------------------
    # Period bins (survey year)
    # Now includes 2020+
    # -----------------------
    years = frcode(
      year >= 1972 & year <= 1979 ~ "1970s",
      year >= 1980 & year <= 1989 ~ "1980s",
      year >= 1990 & year <= 1999 ~ "1990s",
      year >= 2000 & year <= 2009 ~ "2000s",
      year >= 2010 & year <= 2019 ~ "2010s",
      year >= 2020               ~ "2020s"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    cohorts = factor(cohorts),
    years   = factor(years)
  )




library(tidyverse)
library(socsci)

weekly_by_cohort_period <- gss %>%
  mutate(
    # weekly attendance (your definition)
    weekly_plus = if_else(attend %in% c(6, 7, 8), 1, 0),
    
    # weights (GSS rule)
    weight = case_when(
      year <= 2018 ~ wtssall,
      year >= 2021 ~ wtssnrps,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cohorts), !is.na(years)) %>%
  group_by(cohorts, years) %>%
  mean_ci(weekly_plus, wt = weight)


weekly_by_cohort_period <- weekly_by_cohort_period %>%
  mutate(
    cohorts = fct_relevel(cohorts, sort(unique(cohorts))),
    years   = fct_relevel(years, c("1970s","1980s","1990s","2000s","2010s","2020s"))
  )


library(tidyverse)


heat_data <- weekly_by_cohort_period %>%
  # filter small cell sizes
  mutate(
    mean_pct = mean * 100,
    label = if_else(n >= 50, sprintf("%.0f%%", mean_pct), ""),
    mean_display = if_else(n >= 50, mean, NA_real_),
    cohorts = fct_relevel(cohorts, sort(levels(cohorts))),
    years = fct_relevel(years, c("1970s","1980s","1990s","2000s","2010s","2020s"))
  )

ggplot(heat_data, aes(x = years, y = cohorts, fill = mean_display)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.2, family = "bold", na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    name = "Weekly Attendance",
    low = "white",
    high = "steelblue",
    na.value = "white",
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  theme_rb() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Weekly Church Attendance by Birth Cohort and Period",
    caption = "@ryanburge | Data: General Social Survey, 1972-2024",
    x = "Period of Interview",
    y = "Birth Cohort"
  )
save("gss_attend_age_cohorts24_heat.png")



library(tidyverse)
library(socsci)

gss_cohort_lifestage <- gss %>%
  mutate(
    # birth year
    birthyr = year - age,
    
    # filter cohorts with meaningful life-stage data
    birth_filter = birthyr >= 1920 & birthyr <= 1994
  ) %>%
  filter(birth_filter) %>%
  
  # 5-year birth cohorts (trimmed to 1920–1994 range)
  mutate(
    cohorts = frcode(
      birthyr >= 1920 & birthyr <= 1924 ~ "1920-1924",
      birthyr >= 1925 & birthyr <= 1929 ~ "1925-1929",
      birthyr >= 1930 & birthyr <= 1934 ~ "1930-1934",
      birthyr >= 1935 & birthyr <= 1939 ~ "1935-1939",
      birthyr >= 1940 & birthyr <= 1944 ~ "1940-1944",
      birthyr >= 1945 & birthyr <= 1949 ~ "1945-1949",
      birthyr >= 1950 & birthyr <= 1954 ~ "1950-1954",
      birthyr >= 1955 & birthyr <= 1959 ~ "1955-1959",
      birthyr >= 1960 & birthyr <= 1964 ~ "1960-1964",
      birthyr >= 1965 & birthyr <= 1969 ~ "1965-1969",
      birthyr >= 1970 & birthyr <= 1974 ~ "1970-1974",
      birthyr >= 1975 & birthyr <= 1979 ~ "1975-1979",
      birthyr >= 1980 & birthyr <= 1984 ~ "1980-1984",
      birthyr >= 1985 & birthyr <= 1989 ~ "1985-1989",
      birthyr >= 1990 & birthyr <= 1994 ~ "1990-1994"
    ),
    
    # life stages
    lifestage = frcode(
      age >= 18 & age <= 29 ~ "18–\n29",
      age >= 30 & age <= 44 ~ "30–\n44",
      age >= 45 & age <= 59 ~ "45–\n59",
      age >= 60 & age <= 74 ~ "60–\n74",
      age >= 75             ~ "75+"
    ),
    
    # weekly+
    weekly_plus = if_else(attend %in% c(6, 7, 8), 1, 0),
    
    # weights
    weight = case_when(
      year <= 2018 ~ wtssall,
      year >= 2021 ~ wtssnrps,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cohorts), !is.na(lifestage)) %>%
  group_by(cohorts, lifestage) %>%
  mean_ci(weekly_plus, wt = weight) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    lifestage = fct_relevel(lifestage, "18–\n29","30–\n44","45–\n59","60–\n74","75+"),
    cohorts   = factor(cohorts, levels = sort(unique(cohorts)))
  )




# assume you already have something like:
palette_cohort <- c(
  "#1F77B4", "#FF7F0E", "#2CA02C", "#D62728", "#9467BD",
  "#8C564B", "#E377C2", "#7F7F7F", "#BCBD22", "#17BECF",
  "#AEC7E8", "#FFBB78", "#98DF8A", "#FF9896", "#C5B0D5"
)

gss_cohort_lifestage %>%
  # optional: drop cohorts with very tiny Ns overall
  group_by(cohorts) %>%
  mutate(total_n = sum(n, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(total_n >= 200) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = lifestage,
    y = mean,
    group = cohorts,
    color = cohorts,
    fill  = cohorts
  )) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_cohort) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = palette_cohort) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~ cohorts, ncol = 5) +
  theme_rb(legend = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Weekly Church Attendance by Birth Cohort and Life Stage (GSS)",
    subtitle = "Each panel shows how a single 5-year birth cohort changes as it ages",
    x = "Life Stage (Age)",
    y = "Weekly Attendance"
  )


save("gss_birth_cohort_lifestage_faceted_ribbons.png", ht = 10, wd = 8)




```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
